_comment: This is the single source of truth for the directory. Each entry is one bloc. To add an approved submission, append an object to the 'blocs' array and commit. Keep it valid JSON (watch trailing commas).

_schema.name: Display name of the bloc (required)
_schema.region: Top-level region grouping, e.g. 'USA – West', 'Canada', 'United Kingdom' (required)
_schema.location: Sub-location shown as a tag, e.g. 'CA (California)' or 'London' (optional)
_schema.description: Short blurb about what they offer (optional)
_schema.status: One of: active, getting-started, inactive, clean-air, advocacy, care-collective, campus, charity (optional, defaults to active)
_schema.lat: Latitude as a number, used for the map (optional but recommended)
_schema.lng: Longitude as a number, used for the map (optional but recommended)

blocs.description: Now avail for distro in the Greater Philly Area: masks, covid tests, airborne safety ed, + public health & harm redux goods 😷 More comrades always welcome 💙 We are on crip time🦋.

blocs.name: Covid Naarm Mask Bloc
blocs.description: We offer free respirators (KF94, KN95, N95 & P2), rapid tests, menstrual supplies, zines, and we are starting to distribute free air purifiers for local community spaces.

blocs.name: Safer Shared Air Collective
blocs.description: A mutual aid group with efforts focused in Southeast Michigan, with an air purifier (& more!) lending library, local events and clean air advocacy.
